Lewis himself

𓇼 ⋆｡˚ 𓆝⋆｡˚ 𓇼𓆉 ⋆.˚𓇼 ⋆.˚𓆟𓇼 ⋆｡˚ 𓆝⋆｡˚ 𓇼

Chat, I have a revelation... He was always intended to be a smart af guy... Yeah.

So now, instead of taking the route of somebody following his childhood crush, he actually built his own company with Blackjack and- enough money to just throw parties at private islands anytime he wants! And even allow his most important workers to have enough money to do the same!

Lewis Pierce, with that blazing temper and sarcastic edge, was never just some chaotic pretty boy with a tail and a chip on his shoulder. No, he was always playing a longer game with his brilliance behind mood swings and playful sabotage. The type of guy who’ll knock your drink into the pool and quote something obscure about neural net optimization five minutes later just to mess with you. He’s a storm in a bottle, half-genius, half-brat, half-dolphin asshole, and he knows exactly how dangerous that combination makes him.

He didn’t chase a dream—he built one. From scratch. While everyone thought he was too hot-headed to lead, too chaotic to succeed, he quietly turned his recklessness into strategy, his rebellion into innovation. Now he’s not just the guy with the best underwater tricks at the rave—he’s the reason the rave exists in the first place.

And yet... he’s still the tsundere menace. Still short-circuiting when someone really gets to him. Still brushing off praise with a scoff and a lazy, "Yeah, whatever," while secretly savoring every word. He's the type of
